positive: A stylized, intricate celestial creature composed of glowing nebula dust, cosmic geometry, and ethereal stardust. The creature should have a majestic, symmetrical silhouette, resembling a winged unicorn or griffin, radiating vibrant, neon-accented bioluminescence against a deep space gradient background. Focus on sharp outlines, metallic gold leaf accents, and patterns inspired by ancient zodiac maps. Composition must be centered, filling the frame with powerful, symmetrical energy. Art Style: Neo-Art Nouveau combined with Vaporwave/Cyberpunk glow. Lighting: Dramatic high contrast, rim lighting emphasizing contours. Color Palette: Deep indigo, electric cyan, vibrant magenta, and metallic gold. Print Details: Vector illustration quality, suitable for screen printing, clean hard edges, high resolution, seamless pattern potential.
negative: blurry, noise, low detail, artifacts, grain, jpeg compression, watermark, text, signature, sloppy, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, monochrome, photorealistic, 3d render
